hero.title: Welcome to TW Cobre
hero.subtitle: Victory is hidden in the details and flawless planning. Save time in your Tribal Wars journey and devise strategic plans that will lead your tribe to victory. Choose a tool to get started.

opPlanner.title: Personal Operation Planner
opPlanner.desc: Match source and target villages to prepare a flawless operation template (BBCode).

buildingPlanner.title: Building Planner
buildingPlanner.desc: Design your village's construction plan step by step with advanced queue simulation.

unitCalculator.title: Troop Production Calculator
unitCalculator.desc: Calculate unit production times for Barracks, Stable, and Workshop, including bonuses.

mapGenerator.title: Map Generator
mapGenerator.desc: Generate up-to-date, colored dynamic world maps for clan forums.

mapAnalysis.title: Continent Analysis
mapAnalysis.desc: Analyze clan and player continent dominances on the world map.

productionData.title: Production Calculator
productionData.desc: Optimize mine production rates, storage capacities, and fill times.

coinMinter.title: Gold Coin Planner
coinMinter.desc: Calculate the most ideal village for minting Gold Coins.

churchPlanner.title: Church Planner
churchPlanner.desc: Optimize your church coverage areas on the map with a population-saving algorithm.

buildingTimes.title: Building Times Calculator
buildingTimes.desc: Calculate and compare building construction times at different levels down to the second.

clanOp.title: Tribe Operation Planner
clanOp.desc: Analyze all clan villages and make smart assignments. Distribute personalized BBCode orders to members with map-supported staff intelligence.

clanTroop.title: Tribe Operation Planner (With Troops)
clanTroop.desc: Analyze all clan troops and make smart assignments. Distribute personalized BBCode orders to members with map-supported staff intelligence.

fastSupport.title: Fast Support Finder
fastSupport.desc: Create a support request to get fast support.

footer.text1: Advanced Planning Tools for Tribal Wars

aboutPage.title: About
aboutPage.p2: TW Cobre is an elite tactical panel and command center developed independently to process raw data from Clans (Tribal Wars) players and help them gain strategic superiority.
aboutPage.p3: From operation planning to cleanup analysis, all modules are designed to solve calculations that would take a player hours in seconds. Victory is hidden in the details!
aboutPage.contactDesc: You can send me errors, omissions, or development suggestions you encounter on our site directly via email.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy and KVKK
privacyPage.p1: TW Cobre respects user privacy at the highest level. In accordance with data protection laws (GDPR) and international standards, our data processing policy is as follows:

items.i1: Account Security: TW Cobre NEVER requests, stores, or hosts your Tribal Wars account password, email, or personal session information on its servers.
items.i2: Local Storage: Your settings (world speed, troop counts, village coordinates, etc.) are stored only in your own device's browser (Local Storage / Session Storage) so they are not lost when you refresh the page.
items.i3: External Data Fetching: The map and analysis modules process general world data publicly provided by Tribal Wars in real time. This operation occurs once per hour. In accordance with game rules, this data only contains general village and player information and does not include your personal data.
items.i4: Statistics: Visitor and map generation counters on our site are only numerical data; they are not matched with your IP address or identity.

privacyPage.p2: By using TW Cobre, you agree that your data is processed securely on your device and that your privacy is protected.

header.title: TwCu Notification Center
header.subtitle: You can manage your notification settings for all the worlds you play from here.

infoPanel.title: How to Use?
infoPanel.profileNameDesc: This is a name you set to remember this settings group. <u>Cannot be left empty</u> and is the main label that identifies you in the system.
infoPanel.specialIdDesc: It is the unique code that allows you to match with the system. If you don't have it, you can generate a random one by clicking the Generate ID button.
infoPanel.worldLinkDesc: It is the root address of the world you are playing (Ex: https://tr1.klanlar.org/). The bot provides all data flow through this address.
infoPanel.botTokenDesc: Required for notifications. Chat ID: You can find it by writing /start to @userinfobot in Telegram. Bot Token: You can create your own bot by writing /newbot to @BotFather.
infoPanel.filtersInfo:
Instant Notifications: Updated every 3 minutes and shows only the current status.

Hourly/Daily/Weekly Notifications: Reports the movements in that time period in bulk at the specified intervals. Hourly every hour on the hour, Daily every morning at 08:00, Weekly every Monday at 08:00.

Map Image Notifications: Contains visuals showing the status of your targets on the map instantly.
infoPanel.entityFiltersDesc: Periodic Reports, Map Images and other trackings are not global; they are selected <u>specifically for each player and tribe you add</u>. You can do detailed filtering (instant, hourly, gains, losses etc.) from the settings next to each target.
infoPanel.continentTrackingDesc: You can track conquest movements in those regions by specifying only the continents you are interested in (Ex: 44,45,54).
infoPanel.warTrackingDesc: It allows you to get war reports by instantly matching village gain/loss statuses between two tribes you specify.
infoPanel.customHighlightsDesc: You can mark the players or tribes you want on the map with colors of your choice and track their status with daily/weekly periods.
infoPanel.autoMapsDesc: You can add the world's top 20 player/tribe maps and weekly top village gain/loss lists to your automatic notifications with a single button.
infoPanel.fullTrackingDesc: Allows you to instantly track all village conquest movements in the world. Warning: It can create excessive message traffic.
infoPanel.note: Note: These settings are for the notification system. To take advantage of all TwCu features, you need to have your Special Access ID approved from TwCobre@protonmail.com. Usage is Free.
